nodes.label: Feedback-Based Adaptive RSS Database with Spatial Interpolation
nodes.source_file: raw/Sci-Hub. Indoor localization improvement via adaptive RSS fingerprinting database : The Internationa.pdf
nodes.rationale: Using a small number of re-measured 'feedback' points and spatial interpolation propagates database updates to adjacent locations, reducing database staleness without full re-survey costs.
